# mpsndarray()

**Instance Method**

Return an mpsndarray object will copy contents if the contents are not stored in an MPS ndarray.

## Declaration

```swift
func mpsndarray() -> MPSNDArray
```

## Return Value

A valid MPSNDArray, or nil if allocation fails.
title: mpsndarray()
